This addition aims not only to address the primary issue of teratogenesis risk reduction but also seeks synergistic effect through combination therapy, enhancing overall safety profile without compromising critical seizure prevention needs. Given this comprehensive consideration, option D appears more balanced and safer compared to immediate cessation of valproate despite beneficial aspects mentioned in other options B & C regarding alternatives that don't fully mitigate existing high-risk factors independently posed by valproate usage throughout pregnancy period. 

Answer Choice: D Adding Lamotrigine to continue Valporate ensures safer long-term outcome. Thank you!
